name: uniz-production-vault
description: UniZ Microservices Production Ecosystem - Master Vault

scripts.watch: ssh -t -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@76.13.241.174 "watch -n 1 'kubectl get hpa; echo; kubectl get pods'"
scripts.install:all: for d in apps/uniz-* apps/ornate-core infra/core-infra; do (cd $d && npm install && npm audit fix); done
scripts.setup: cp secrets.env.example secrets.env && npm run vault:sync
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "GATEWAY,AUTH,USER,PORTAL" -c "cyan,magenta,blue,yellow" "cd apps/uniz-gateway && npm run dev" "cd apps/uniz-auth && npm run dev" "cd apps/uniz-user && npm run dev" "cd apps/uniz-portal && npm run dev"
scripts.sync:host: concurrently -n "GATEWAY,AUTH,USER,PORTAL" -c "cyan,magenta,blue,yellow" "cd apps/uniz-gateway && npm run dev" "cd apps/uniz-auth && npm run dev" "cd apps/uniz-user && npm run dev" "cd apps/uniz-portal && npm run sync"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n "CORE,ACADEMICS,OUTPASS,FILES,NOTIFY,MAIL,CRON" -c "reset,green,cyan,white,yellow,magenta,red" "npm run dev" "cd apps/uniz-academics && npm run dev" "cd apps/uniz-outpass && npm run dev" "cd apps/uniz-files && npm run dev" "cd apps/uniz-notifications && npm run dev" "cd apps/uniz-mail && npm run dev" "cd apps/uniz-cron && npm run dev"
scripts.sync:all:host: concurrently -n "CORE,ACADEMICS,OUTPASS,FILES,NOTIFY,MAIL,CRON" -c "reset,green,cyan,white,yellow,magenta,red" "npm run sync:host" "cd apps/uniz-academics && npm run dev" "cd apps/uniz-outpass && npm run dev" "cd apps/uniz-files && npm run dev" "cd apps/uniz-notifications && npm run dev" "cd apps/uniz-mail && npm run dev" "cd apps/uniz-cron && npm run dev"
